title: Create: Drill Levitite
description: Drill levitite block from Create: Aeronautics and get drop.
body:
[![JOIN OUR DISCORD](https://img.shields.io/badge/JOIN%20OUR%20DISCORD-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/4XUPywnEyE)

By default in the [Create: Aeronautics](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-aeronautics) mod, breaking Levitite blocks results in losing them completely. This addon changes that behavior. When you drill a Levitite block with an mechanical drill - the block will now drop as an item, allowing you to collect it.
